name: Google Analytics 4 (GA4)
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "To enable Site Search tracking on GA 4"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Log into your Google Account"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Log into your"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://analytics.google.com/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": " Google Account"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Go to \"Data Streams\""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the admin panel, navigate to \"Data Streams\" Settings, or use the search bar on top"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/U260S7AL72UM/52d4d92-1-data-streams.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/U260S7AL72UM/52d4d92-1-data-streams.png", "name": "52d4d92-1._Data_Streams.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 67299, "width": 1553, "height": 688, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 486, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T17:49:08+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the website you want to enable or verify site search settings"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Configure \"Enhanced Measurement\""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "First, confirm that the 'Enhanced measurement' option has been activated."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/HQX3NQUH4AGL/ff9abfa-2-enhanced-measurement.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/HQX3NQUH4AGL/ff9abfa-2-enhanced-measurement.png", "name": "ff9abfa-2._Enhanced_measurement.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 65222, "width": 1285, "height": 493, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 487, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T17:49:51+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Then, click on the small gear icon located on the right-hand side to unveil the expanded list of enhanced settings. It is important to verify that the 'Site search' setting is activated."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 4: Configure query parameter"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the menu, go to \"Site Search\" settings & click on the \"Show advanced settings\" to configure the query parameters. Query parameter can be adjusted in Merchandising Cloud and the most commonly used are "}, {"text": "findify_q", "bold": true}, {"text": " or **search_q **."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You'll easiest find the parameter used in your store by conducting a search & reviewing the URL."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "e.g. "}, {"text": "q", "bold": true}, {"text": " in ["}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://demo.findify.io/pages/search-results", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Search Results"}]}, {"text": " ?"}, {"text": "q", "bold": true}, {"text": "=item]"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3XXMS2ARU3HX/0910a20-3-site-search.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3XXMS2ARU3HX/0910a20-3-site-search.png", "name": "0910a20-3._Site_Search.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 392826, "width": 1251, "height": 1125, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 488, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T17:52:22+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ensure that the parameter you're using is listed in the advanced settings."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "📘 Default Tracking"}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "By default, search events are automatically tracked by Google Analytics if you have Site Search Tracking enabled in your Google Analytics setup."}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "However, in certain cases, Findify query parameters can conflict with your site query parameters which can cause issues. To overcome this issue, we're prefixing our parameters with a common prefix, e.g. "}, {"text": "findify", "code": true}, {"text": ", so instead of "}, {"text": "q", "code": true}, {"text": " to identify the query parameter, "}, {"text": "findify_q", "code": true}, {"text": " is used, which is not tracked by Google Analytics by default."}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/NBVJ1AQQXHHO/9410805-5-configure-parameter.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/NBVJ1AQQXHHO/9410805-5-configure-parameter.png", "name": "9410805-5._Configure_Parameter.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 137864, "width": 842, "height": 941, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 492, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T17:56:08+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 5: Save your changes"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Make sure you save your changes before exiting the Enhanced measurement tab."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Query parameters cannot have additional characters like \"_\", \"-\" etc."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have special requirements, out the Findify support team for help with setting this up in the best way."}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "How to create a custom audience in GA4"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "What is a GA4 Audience?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Simplified, an audience is a group of users that you want to monitor based on any combination of interactions in a given timeframe. The audience allows you to segment the users based on events, dimensions and metrics important to a business."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Examples"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Mobile audience:", "bold": true}, {"text": " users who visited the website on a mobile device"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "**Purchasers: **users who make a purchase."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GA4 evaluates if a user belongs to an audience group based on the criteria that is set up, if a user qualifies they are added. If they no longer meet a criteria they are also automatically removed. A user that satisfies the conditions of multiple audience groups will be included in all of them ("}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/12799087?hl=en", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Read more here"}]}, {"text": ")"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By default, Google automatically creates two audiences for you ‘All users’ and ‘Purchasers’."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to collect and track site specific Findify search activity you need to create a custom audience that captures and satisfies certain criteria."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before we begin ensure you have enabled site search on your Google account (as described in section above)."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Log into your Google Account"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Log into your"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://analytics.google.com/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": " Google Account"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Go to \"Audience\" Settings"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the admin panel, navigate to \"Audience\" settings, or use the search bar on top."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select New Audience."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/7R4RIXQ5RML2/69ea535-1-audience-settings.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/7R4RIXQ5RML2/69ea535-1-audience-settings.png", "name": "69ea535-1._Audience_Settings.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 231963, "width": 1999, "height": 1067, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 489, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T17:52:51+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Configure the New Audience"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select New Custom Audience"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When setting up an audience you need to define the scope, event, dimension, or metric that you would like to apply"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Scope : This defines the scope of when conditions will be met"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Across all sessions - adds a user to the audience if the condition is true for all the previous sessions"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Within the same session - adds a user to the audience if the condition is true for the current session (live session)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Single event - adds the user to the audience if the condition is true for a particular event"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select \"Within the same session"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L83M801U9GEG/8ccd404-8-session.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L83M801U9GEG/8ccd404-8-session.png", "name": "8ccd404-8._Session.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 537503, "width": 4400, "height": 1563, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 491, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T17:54:14+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set duration to 1 day to capture activity per day."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By default, GA4 fires the \"view_search_results\" event when a user inputs a query and clicks on the search button on the website. As the event gets fired on the website, Google sends default parameters such as search_term, page_location and source."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the event \"view_search_results\"."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Note: If there is no \"view_search_results\" - event, the site search tracking is not correctly defined or there is no analytics captured."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "url", "url": "https://files.readme.io/02f8181-6._Critera.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/02f8181-6._Critera.png", "name": "Untitled Image", "type": "image/png", "size": 0, "width": 1236, "height": 507, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "embedType": "image"}, "children": [{"text": "https://files.readme.io/02f8181-6._Critera.png"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Additional criteria can be added as sequences let you specify conditions that need to be met for a user to become a member of this audience."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to know the activity that triggered a purchase as a result of search on the website, a sequence of event \"purchase\" can be added."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "url", "url": "https://files.readme.io/1f21565-7._Sequence.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/ec76703-9._Purchase.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/ec76703-9._Purchase.png", "name": "Untitled Image", "type": "image/png", "size": 0, "width": 1191, important to keep the scope the same as before ‘Within the same session’."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "url", "url": "https://files.readme.io/8ccd404-8._Session.png",
